name: SDK.finance
description: Modular API-first payment infrastructure for wallets, multi-currency accounts, and orchestration.

seo.title: SDK.finance — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: SDK.finance: Modular API-first payment infrastructure for wallets, multi-currency accounts, and orchestration.

when_to_use: Building multi-currency wallet APIs with modular infrastructure
Launching payment orchestration layer for fintech startups
API-first wallet and account management for embedded finance

pros: Suited for wallets and multi-currency accounts
cons: Heavy lift to customize and deploy
Not a turnkey orchestrator for merchants
Support depth depends on license tier
review.verdict: Useful as building blocks for a fintech program, but do not mistake it for a ready-to-use merchant orchestrator.
review.best_for: Fintech founders building wallets, remittance, or neobank products who want a licensable core stack.
review.not_for: E-commerce merchants looking for a plug-in orchestration layer over existing PSPs.
